productDisplayName: Baggit Women Wrap Index Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cmCrafted from leatherette with print detailsOne zippered compartment with a fabric separatorA buttonable flap with six card holders, an id holder and two pockets on one side and four card holders on the otherA pocket at the backA buttonable flap pocket on the frontTwo short handlesCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
